report.summary: Community growth cycle v31: SEC-CFTC MOU (BTC/ETH classified as commodities, regulatory clarity) + BTC breaks $74K after 38-day Extreme Fear streak (longest since Terra/Luna) + Aave V4 launch (345 days of audits, $1.5M security budget) + Lido V3 approaching (custom yield strategies, ETF integration) + $1.06B weekly inflows (3rd straight week); weekly newsletter draft for Apr 24; 2 engagement posts for Apr 25; calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 21-27; 2 new social cards created (sec-cftc-mou-2026, btc-74k-extreme-fear).

Tweet (Mon Apr 21 AM): SEC-CFTC MOU single — regulatory clarity, institutional inflows not waiting

Twitter thread (Tue Apr 22 AM, 5 posts): BTC $74K After 38 Days Extreme Fear — longest streak since Terra/Luna, historical parallels (2022 +70%, 2020 +1500%, 2018 +300%), $285M short liquidations, Fed held rates, institutions buying; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator + /tools/fear-greed-timeline
Tweet (Tue Apr 22 AM): BTC $74K single — 38 days fear, ETF inflows, short squeeze

Twitter thread (Wed Apr 23 AM, 5 posts): Aave V4 Launch — hub-and-spoke architecture, 345 days security audits, $1.5M budget, redesigned banking-style app, post-Balancer hack context; CTA to /learn/aave-v4-guide + /tools/lending-rates
Tweet (Wed Apr 23 AM): Aave V4 single — most audited DeFi upgrade ever
Newsletter (Thu Apr 24): Weekly edition — SEC-CFTC MOU, BTC $74K rally, Aave V4, Lido V3, new pages (stablechains, crypto index funds, smart wallets), Degen Corner on Extreme Fear historical patterns
Tweet (Fri Apr 25 AM): Fear cycle poll — DCA through dip / bought breakout / held / sold and regretted
Tweet (Fri Apr 25 PM): Regulatory clarity discussion — does the SEC-CFTC MOU change your thesis

Twitter thread (Sat Apr 26 AM, 5 posts): Lido V3 — custom yield strategies, modular architecture, ETF integration paths, 28% staked ETH, staking wars; CTA to /investing/staking + /tools/staking-apy + /investing/staking/reviews/lido
Tweet (Sat Apr 26 AM): Lido V3 single — yield infrastructure layer for TradFi integration
Tweet (Sun Apr 27 AM): Weekly market wrap — SEC-CFTC, BTC $74K, Aave V4, Lido V3, Fed rates

Then Bitcoin Hit $74,000.'; full-width Fear & Greed visualization bar with position marker at 23; 4 historical pattern cards (2022 +70%, 2020 +1500%, 2018 +300%, 2026 $74K breakout); green CTA to DCA calculator. sections.title: Analytics Context
items: SEC-CFTC MOU (Mon Apr 21): Signed March 11 — the single biggest regulatory development in US crypto history. BTC/ETH classified as commodities. Joint Harmonization Initiative co-led by Robert Teply (SEC) and Meghan Tente (CFTC). Clarity Act pending in Congress would make this permanent law. Regulatory uncertainty was the top institutional barrier — now lifting. $1.06B weekly inflows are the direct market response.

BTC $74K + Extreme Fear (Tue Apr 22): 38 consecutive days in Extreme Fear — longest since Terra/Luna (June 2022). Lowest reading: 8 (during peak Iran-war uncertainty). March 16 reading: 23 (climbing). BTC broke $74K resistance on multiple catalysts: Fed held at 3.5-3.75%, SEC-CFTC MOU, Strait of Hormuz reopening signs, $285M short squeeze. Historical pattern: every extended fear period followed by significant rally. Bitcoin dominance at 59.21%.

Aave V4 (Wed Apr 23): Major DeFi upgrade live. Hub-and-spoke architecture, 345 days of security audits, $1.5M DAO-approved budget. Post-Balancer V2 $120M hack context makes security narrative compelling. Redesigned banking-style app targets non-DeFi users. Links to Aave V4 guide and lending rates tool.

Newsletter (Thu Apr 24): Regulatory clarity + market rally + DeFi upgrades = strong open rate drivers. Degen Corner on Extreme Fear historical patterns is highly shareable. New published pages (stablechains, crypto index funds, smart wallets) get newsletter distribution.
Community Engagement (Fri Apr 25): Fear cycle poll drives replies (emotional topic = high engagement). Regulatory clarity discussion targets institutional-adjacent audience.

Lido V3 (Sat Apr 26): Continues staking narrative from v30 (BlackRock ETHB). Audience continuity. Custom yield strategies, ETF integration paths, 28% of staked ETH. Weekend educational content gets highest save/bookmark rate.
497 pages published, 1 in queue (morpho-protocol-guide). Calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 21-27. No posting conflicts with v30 (ends Sun Apr 20).
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v31.md
